title: Tarzan and the Great River
writer: Bob Barbash, Edgar Rice Burroughs, Lewis Reed
actors: Mike Henry, Jan Murray, Manuel Padilla Jr.
plot: In Brazil, Dr. Ann Philips tries to inoculate the superstitious natives against an epidemic. The murderous Jaguar Men oppose the intrusion. The natives take heart when the riverboat captain's helper Pepe volunteers for the first s...
